name: Login Failures Followed By Success from the same Source IP
notes: Reports multiple log in failures to a single host, followed by a successful log in to the host.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source match with the same Source IP
conditions_text: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source match with the same Source IP
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source match with the same Source IP
TD_list: APPLY Login Failures Followed By Success from the same Source IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source match with the same Source IP
RED_list: Event name: Login Failures Followed By Success from the same Source IP
Event description: Detected a source IP causing an authentication failure event followed by a successful login.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
